name_en: 🌷Includes full original green box packaging🌷GG Marmont Wallet. This GG Marmont Wallet is crafted in classic and durable brown leather, adding a classic piece to the 'Aria' collection. The double-G hardware reinterprets the 1970s belt buckle design using matching resin material. The combination of classic design and monochrome colorway highlights a modern fashion style.
name_cn:
🌷Includes full original green box packaging🌷GG Marmont Wallet. This GG Marmont Wallet is crafted in classic and durable brown leather, adding a classic piece to the 'Aria' collection. The double-G hardware reinterprets the 1970s belt buckle design using matching resin material. The combination of classic design and monochrome colorway highlights a modern fashion style.
Model: 739498.
Size: 13*8.5*2cm.
Color: Brown/Original leather.
